title: Kukla, Fran and Ollie
overview: Kukla, Fran and Ollie is an early American television show using puppets, originally created for children but soon watched by more adults than children. It did not have a script and was entirely ad-libbed. It aired from 1947 to 1957.
creator: Burr Tillstrom
